close.title: Confirm Action
close.description: Do you want to minimize the application to the system tray or close the application?

setting.title: Settings
setting.launcher_update_desc: Check if your launcher is up to date.
setting.launcher_update_success: Launcher is already up to date
setting.closing_auto_desc: Next time you close the app, it will automatically {{action}} without asking.
setting.source_hint: Switching will re-download server and proxy.
setting.source_desc: Choose where the server and proxy are downloaded from
setting.launch_mode_desc: Pick how the launcher starts the game
setting.patch_url_desc: The March7thHoney proxy will forward intercepted traffic here.
setting.patch_url_hint: Leave empty to use the default server (march7th.hoyotoon.com)
setting.proxy_port_desc: Local port the proxy listens on.
setting.proxy_port_hint: Leave 0 to pick a free port automatically
setting.rsa_key_hint: Leave empty to use the built-in default key
setting.web_hosts_hint: One host per line or comma-separated; leave empty for default list

home.tooltip_how_to: How to use all tools & commands
home.tip_close_genshin_server: After stopping the server, Genshin will not be able to connect.
home.status_update_success: Launcher updated successfully, auto closing after 5s
home.status_update_failed: Launcher update failed, auto closing after 5s
home.modal_update_msg: Do you want to update data server and proxy?

home.modal_download_msg: Data server and proxy download required

diff.header_desc: Help you update game with Diff Tool
diff.game_dir_invalid: Game directory not found. Please select the correct folder.
diff.diff_file_invalid: Diff file not found. Please select the correct file.
diff.inst_step_1: 1. Click "Select Game Folder" and choose your game's root directory
diff.inst_step_2: 2. Wait for the system to validate the game directory
diff.inst_step_3: 3. Click "Select Diff file Folder" and choose your diff file's root directory
diff.inst_step_4: 4. Wait for the system to validate the diff file directory
diff.inst_step_5: 5. Click "Update Game" to save your changes
diff.toast_game_dir_not_found: Game directory not found. Please select the correct folder.
diff.toast_select_both: Please select game directory and diff file

language.header_desc: Manage text and voice language settings for your game
language.game_dir_invalid: Game directory not found. Please select the correct folder.
language.inst_step_1: 1. Click "Select Game Folder" and choose your game's root directory
language.inst_step_2: 2. Wait for the system to validate the game directory
language.inst_step_3: 3. Select your preferred text and voice languages
language.inst_step_4: 4. Click "Apply Language Settings" to save your changes

howto.title: How to Use
howto.sect1_launch_game: Launch the game directly through the launcher with correct parameters and runtime environment.
howto.sect1_lang_pre: Support switching in-game language (e.g., EN, JP, ZH, KR) via
howto.sect2_desc_pre: Below are in-game chat commands you can use. Some commands require you to enable
howto.sect2_tc_req_desc_pre: The following commands are only available when
howto.sect2_hidden_ui_desc: Instantly hides the entire game UI — often used in DIM showcase videos.
howto.sect2_censor_desc: Remove the Lens Flare censor effect 💀 for a cleaner experience.
howto.sect2_tc_desc: No need to type chat commands anymore — configure everything through the web: adjust monster HP, set cycles, view logs, and more.
howto.sect2_cmd_hp_desc1: — Set monster HP (only available in Theorycraft mode)
howto.sect2_cmd_hp_desc3: — Set HP for each monster in a specific wave
howto.sect2_cmd_hp_ex_post: sets wave 1 monster1 HP=2,000,000 and monster2 HP=3,000,000
howto.sect2_cmd_skip_desc: — Skip nodes in MOC / AS / Pure Fiction
howto.sect3_admin_desc: Always run the launcher as Administrator for file permission access.
howto.sect3_voice_title: Enable Voice Packs in Beta Client
howto.sect3_voice_step1_post_pre: to the beta folder by clicking
howto.sect3_voice_step2: When launching the game for the first time, it may delete the voice folder. If so, repeat step 1 to restore it.
howto.m7h_desc: A local HTTPS MITM proxy intercepts all miHoYo / HoYoverse traffic and forwards it to your private server. No DLL injection required — works with both OS and CN clients.
howto.m7h_step2: Set the game path to StarRail.exe — not the official HoYoPlay or miHoYo launcher
howto.m7h_step3: Optionally configure the server URL, RSA key, and web redirect hosts in Settings
howto.m7h_step4: Click Start Game — the proxy starts automatically and restores system settings on exit
howto.m7h_proxy_ca: Installs a self-signed CA certificate via certutil so TLS interception works
howto.m7h_proxy_rsa: Replaces RSA public keys in dispatch / config responses
howto.m7h_proxy_url: Rewrites miHoYo domain URLs in HTML / JSON responses
howto.m7h_note_admin: Administrator rights are required to install the CA certificate.
howto.m7h_note_antivirus: If your antivirus flags the launcher, add it to the exclusion list.

about.title: About
about.p1_post: , a developer team passionate about building useful tools and improving user experiences.
about.p2_pre: I created a lightweight and modern
about.p2_post: to help users easily launch and manage their games with better performance and simplicity.
about.p3_mid: , with a clean and responsive interface styled with
about.p4: My goal is to make tools that are fast, efficient, and enjoyable to use — and this launcher is just the beginning.

fireflytools.title: Firefly Tools
fireflytools.sect1_p1_pre: This site is another version of
fireflytools.sect1_p2_pre: The original tool was created by a third-party developer named
fireflytools.sect1_p2_post: . This version is directly based on that work, without modification to core logic.
fireflytools.sect1_p3_pre: There is also a more modern version by the same author available at
fireflytools.sect2_feat1: Configure characters, light cones, relics, traces, and eidolons easily in your browser.
fireflytools.sect2_feat3_censor_desc: — get rid of Lens Flare censor 💀.
fireflytools.sect2_feat3_tc_desc: — configure HP, cycles, and more via the web.
fireflytools.sect2_feat4_pre: Export and import full builds using
fireflytools.sect2_feat5: Fast testing workflow — no sync cooldowns, instant in-game updates.
fireflytools.sect3_step1: Access the tool through your browser at the self-hosted instance.
fireflytools.sect3_step2: Configure your character builds with the intuitive web interface.
fireflytools.sect3_step3_post: feature to instantly sync with your private server.
fireflytools.sect3_step4: Test your builds in-game with real-time updates and modifications.

news.header_desc: Real-time HoYoLAB updates and server announcements

analysis.title: Firefly Analysis & Veritas Plugin
analysis.sect1_p1_post: designed for analyzing damage in real-time during gameplay.
analysis.sect1_p2: It's lightweight, fast, and easy to use for comprehensive damage analysis.
analysis.sect2_desc: Use these web applications for real-time damage analysis with Veritas:
analysis.sect2_tip_post: If your country has issues loading from the master site, please use the backup site instead.
analysis.sect3_desc: After downloading Veritas, you must rename the file for it to work properly:
analysis.sect4_sub1_step2: Open one of the web analysis tools.
analysis.sect4_sub1_step4: Once connected, play the game. The tool will automatically analyze in the background.
analysis.sect4_sub2_step2: Open one of the web analysis tools.
analysis.sect4_sub2_step4: Once connected, play the game normally.

console.title: Console
console.subtitle: Connect with your UID and password to run in-game commands from the launcher.
console.err_fields: Please enter your UID and password.
console.err_uid: UID must be a positive number.
console.err_connect: Failed to connect. Check your UID, password and that you are online.
console.hb_subtitle: Full-text search over the handbook (commands, items, ids…).
console.hb_hint: Pick a language and type to search the handbook.
console.reset_desc: Wipe your own gameplay data and start fresh (account and password are kept). Useful if your save is broken or stuck — works even if you can't log in.
console.reset_confirm_q: This permanently wipes your save. Are you sure?
console.reset_done: Your save has been reset. Log in again for a fresh start.
